transcription.text: There are many prescription pain medicines and a doctor can prescribe any of them. Yet 82% of doctors surveyed have prescribed Arutus and now for the first time it's available in a non-prescription strain. New Arutus KT. It's so potent just 25 milligrams is as effective as 400 milligrams of Motrin IV, 440 of Aleve or 1,000 milligrams of extra strength Tylenol. New Arutus KT, the potent medicine for pain.
